Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects through hands-on proof-of-concept validation.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time **39%** and increasing drill capacity 21% while capturing and communicating representative metrics to GTM and engineering stakeholders.

tailoring_notes: Dropped weakest bullet from microsoft_ft and tightened all roles to fit one page.
